arguments.name: Allow
arguments.description: Allow extra privileged entitlement (e.g., network.host, security.insecure)

arguments.name: Cgroup Parent
arguments.description: Set the parent cgroup for the RUN instructions

arguments.name: Iidfile
arguments.description: Write the image ID to a file

arguments.name: Metadata File
arguments.description: Write build result metadata to a file

arguments.name: Network
arguments.description: Set the networking mode for the RUN instructions

arguments.name: No Cache
arguments.description: Do not use cache when building the image

arguments.name: Pull
arguments.description: Always attempt to pull all referenced images

arguments.name: Secret
arguments.description: Secret to expose to the build (format: id=mysecret,src=/secret/file)

arguments.name: SHM Size
arguments.description: Shared memory size for build containers

arguments.name: SSH
arguments.description: SSH agent socket or keys to expose to the build

arguments.name: Target
arguments.description: Set the target build stage to build

arguments.name: Metadata File
arguments.description: Write build result metadata to a file

arguments.name: No Cache
arguments.description: Do not use cache when building the image

arguments.name: Pull
arguments.description: Always attempt to pull all referenced images

arguments.name: Append
arguments.description: Append a node to builder instead of changing it

arguments.name: Leave
arguments.description: Remove a node from builder instead of changing it

arguments.name: Bootstrap
arguments.description: Ensure builder has booted before inspecting

subcommands.name: buildx rm
subcommands.description: Remove one or more builder instances

arguments.name: Default
arguments.description: Set builder as default for current context

arguments.name: Keep Storage
arguments.description: Amount of disk space to keep for cache

subcommands.name: buildx imagetools create
subcommands.description: Create a new image based on source images

arguments.name: Dry Run
arguments.description: Show final image instead of pushing

arguments.name: File
arguments.description: Read source descriptor from a file

subcommands.name: buildx imagetools inspect
subcommands.description: Show details of an image in the registry

arguments.name: Format
arguments.description: Format output using a custom template
